text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
The way the wrestlers fought to stay in the ring
while teetering on the edge... Hm, I feel like I
could use those methods in my racing...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'll need to review the recording again tonight... if
I want to make that happen...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yeah... I should watch... some of my dad's
matches... that I recorded before...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Sakura Chiyono O ends up getting very little rest.
